settings.text: HomesKitsPro is Kenya's trusted online home store, built to give every household access to quality appliances, electronics, bathroom fittings, tools, flooring, and smart home products — all in one place, at fair prices. We believe that equipping and upgrading your home should be simple, affordable, and stress-free. Whether you are setting up a new home, renovating a bathroom, or replacing a kitchen appliance, we stock what you need and deliver it to your door.

items_repeater.title: Client-Bathroom & Plumbing
items_repeater.name: Peter Kingsley
items_repeater.content: The bathroom sink I ordered looks exactly as described and fits perfectly. Customer service responded quickly when I had a question. Good experience overall — I would happily recommend HomesKitsPro.

items_repeater.title: Client-Kitchen Appliances
items_repeater.name: James M.
items_repeater.content: Ordered a Sonar kettle and a TV wall bracket on Monday and both arrived by Wednesday. Packaging was solid and the prices were better than what I found in town. Will definitely be shopping here again.

items_repeater.title: client -TVs & Electronics
items_repeater.name: Amina Wakesho
items_repeater.content: I bought the Vitron 32-inch TV and a 4-way extension for my bedsitter. The whole setup cost less than I expected and the TV picture is excellent. HomesKitsPro has really good deals on electronics.

settings.text:
HomesKitsPro serves a wide range of customers across Kenya. We work with homeowners setting up or renovating their homes, renters and first-time buyers who need reliable appliances without overspending, and landlords fitting out multiple units with cost-effective essentials. We also supply small businesses and offices equipping their workspaces, contractors and DIY enthusiasts sourcing tools and building materials, and gift buyers looking for practical, high-quality presents from our home and electronics range.

No matter your budget or project size, we stock options at different price points to make sure there is something that works for you — without compromising on quality or reliability.

HomesKitsPro stocks products across ten categories: Home Appliances, Kitchen Appliances, TVs and Entertainment, Audio and Speakers, Security Cameras, Electrical and Power Accessories, Bathroom and Plumbing, Flooring, Tools and Hardware, and Lighting. Our catalogue includes trusted brands such as Philips, TCL, Hisense, Skyworth, Sonar, Premier, and Ailyons, giving customers the choice of branded reliability and competitive alternatives side by side. Every product on the site is in stock and ready to ship. We handle delivery across Kenya, and our team is available seven days a week to help with any questions before or after your purchase.

Our vision is to become Kenya's most trusted and comprehensive online home store — the first place customers turn when they need something for their home, without needing to leave the house to find it. We are continuously growing our catalogue to include smart home devices, energy-efficient appliances, solar accessories, and home office solutions, so that HomesKitsPro grows alongside the homes and lifestyles of our customers.

Quality, affordability, and genuine helpfulness are not targets we aim for — they are the standard we operate from every single day. If a product does not meet the standard we would want in our own homes, it does not go on the site. That commitment is what HomesKitsPro is built on, and it is what we intend to stand behind as we grow.
